IT service management software for ticke: Software de gerenciamento de serviços de TI para ticketing, gerenciamento de ativos e operações TI.
Your Freshservice subdomain (e.g., \"myc: Seu subdomínio de serviço automático (ex: "minhaempresa" de minhaempresa.com).
Your Freshservice API key from Profile S: Sua chave Freshservice API das Configurações de Perfil.
\nTo get your API key:\n1. Log in to you:
To get your API key:
1. Log in to your **Freshservice** account as an agent.
2. Click your **profile picture** in the top-right corner.
3. Go to **Profile Settings**.
4. Your API key is displayed on the right side of the page.

For the domain, enter only the subdomain. For example, if your URL is **mycompany.freshservice.com**, enter **mycompany**.
